question: What is the main function of the device recently discovered in desert ruins?

answers.ground_truth: The main function of the 'Chrono-Regulator' is to stabilize localized temporal distortions.
answers.original: The main function of the device recently discovered in desert ruins is to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.
answers.perturbed: I don't have enough information to answer.

ops.description: Vexian starships are operated by crews consisting of 12 members.

entities.name: Ancient Carvings
entities.description: Ancient carvings surround the Font of Resonance, adding to its sacred nature.<SEP>Ancient carvings surround the Font of Resonance, indicating its historical and cultural significance.

entities.name: Chrono-Regulator
entities.description: The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator is an ancient technological device discovered in desert ruins, designed to stabilize localized temporal distortions and prevent chaotic time anomalies.

entities.name: The Great Library of Aethelgard
entities.description: The Great Library of Aethelgard holds records dating back a thousand years.

entities.name: Desert Ruins
entities.description: The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was discovered, belonging to a forgotten civilization.<SEP>The Desert Ruins are the site where the Chrono-Regulator was recently discovered.

entities.name: Desert of Bones
entities.description: The Desert of Bones is a harsh and desolate region known for its shifting sands and sandstorms.<SEP>The Desert of Bones is a desolate area where ancient War Golems have been unearthed from shifting sands.

entities.name: Long-Lost Empire
entities.description: The Long-Lost Empire is the creator of the War Golems.

relations.description: Ancient carvings surround the Font of Resonance.<SEP>Ancient carvings surround the Font of Resonance, indicating its historical and cultural significance.
The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.<SEP>The Chrono-Regulator was discovered in the Desert Ruins.
The Long-Lost Empire is associated with the Desert of Bones, where their creations, the War Golems, were unearthed.
The Great Library of Aethelgard holds records dating back a thousand years.
